question_text: Which statement correctly describes the arrangement of particles in a solid?

options.label: A
options.text: Particles are tightly packed in a fixed arrangement and vibrate in fixed positions

options.label: B
options.text: Particles are loosely packed and move freely around each other

options.label: C
options.text: Particles are very far apart with no forces between them

options.label: D
options.text: Particles are arranged in layers that slide over each other randomly

explanation: In solids, particles are held together by strong forces, so they stay in fixed positions and can only vibrate. This is why solids have a definite shape and volume. The other options describe gases or liquids, or are not accurate.
